nodes.title: Cook It
nodes.text: A prototype app that allows renting kitchens and restaurants during their idle hours similar to AirBnB.

nodes.title: careconsult
nodes.text: A calendar where vetted health professional volunteers lay out their availability for free remote consultations. Built for DevPost Global COVID-19 Hackathon with my friend Stu Wood.
